basic_details.job_title: GTGH Rajamahendravaram Peer Educator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The Government Teaching General Hospital (GTGH Rajamahendravaram) has officially announced the Peer Educator Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. Candidates up to 42 years of age who meet the prescribed eligibility criteria, including being an ex-drug user with 1–2 years of sobriety and fulfilling the required medical and communication-related conditions, can submit their offline applications on or before 25-07-2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years Age Relaxation: For SC, ST, BC and EWS: 5 years For Ex-service Men: 3 years in addition to length of service For differently abled: 10 years Maximum age limit with all relaxations: 52 years

qualification.education_qualification: Should be illiterate; Ex-Drug user with 1-2 years sobriety. Willing to work among drug using population and having communication skills.
qualification.details: Should be illiterate. Must be an Ex-Drug user with 1-2 years of sobriety. Willingness to work among the drug-using population and possess good communication skills. Agreement to refrain from using, buying, or selling drugs. Readiness to work for the prevention of harmful drug use and replacement. Requirement of: Consent obtained from any Government hospital. Treating doctor's opinion. Patient's OP/IP along with investigations. Communication skills to interact with alcohol patients. Proof of having received medical treatment.

selection_process: Aggregate of marks in qualifying examination (75%) Weightage for experience after qualification (up to 10 marks) Weightage for contract employment in Tribal/Rural/Urban areas
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for GTGH Rajamahendravaram Peer Educator Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for GTGH Rajamahendravaram Peer Educator Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: GTGH Rajamahendravaram Peer Educator Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GTGH Rajamahendravaram Peer Educator recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the filled application form is 25th July 2026, by 04:00 PM. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Peer Educator post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be illiterate, an ex-drug user with 1-2 years of sobriety, willing to work with drug users, and possess good communication skills. They must also agree to refrain from drug use and related activities.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Peer Educator position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Peer Educator post is 42 years. Age relaxations are applicable for SC, ST, BC, EWS, Ex-service Men, and differently-abled candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Peer Educator role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 10,000/- per month for the contractual period.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the GTGH Rajamahendravaram Peer Educator job?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the official notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Peer Educator post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Peer Educator post announced in this recruitment drive by GTGH Rajamahendravaram.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for GTGH Rajamahendravaram Peer Educator recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 300/- for all categories, including General, OBC, SC, and ST candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Peer Educator position?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on the aggregate of marks in the qualifying examination (75%), weightage for experience after qualification (up to 10 marks), and weightage for contract employment in tribal/rural/urban areas.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job is on a contractual basis. The duration and terms of the contract will be as per the official notification and government rules.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form details can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can download them from there.
